arts.ttl: “Would be very sad” – Official worries about losing Chido Obi-Martin, as Manchester United progress opens international debate
arts.sum: At the weekend, Chido Obi-Martin revealed he’d signed his first professional contract at Manchester United. On Friday, the youngster turned 17 years of age, making him eligible to sign the pro deal. On Tuesday, the striker made his debut for Manchester United U21s in their 1-0 win over Rochdale. arts.ttl: Arteta decision could pave way for Chelsea to beat Arsenal to major signing
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is reportedly not convinced by Brighton striker Evan Ferguson as it seems the Gunners won’t be pursuing that transfer as a priority. arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney sack truth as Manchester United legend faces Plymouth challenge
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle chairman Simon Hallett has broken his silence on Wayne Rooney's future as Pilgrims boss.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Former Manchester United star Tony Young dies at 71 as tributes paid
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as tributes come in for Tony Young following his passing at the age of 71

arts.ttl: Arsenal could go and sign £50m striker instead of Alexander Isak this summer - journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a new striker. The Gunners have been looking for a new striker for some time, and they’ve been linked...

arts.ttl: Man Utd scrapped plan to wear LGBT+ themed jackets after player cited religious concern
arts.sum: The Premier League is in the middle of a round of dedicated Rainbow Laces matches but players from clubs including Manchester United have taken firm stances on planned gestures

arts.ttl: Tony Young dead: Manchester United pay tribute as homegrown hero dies aged 71
arts.sum: Tony Young helped Manchester United through one of the club's major low-points in the 1970s, having grown up just a few miles from Old Trafford before making his debut for the club at 17

arts.ttl: Manchester United scrapped plans to wear pride-themed jackets after player refused
arts.sum: Rainbow Devils, Manchester United’s official LGBTQ+ supporters club, said it was disappointed after plans to wear pride-themed tracksuits before the match against Everton were scrapped

arts.ttl: Nico Williams: Ranking Spain star’s best transfer options as Arsenal, Man Utd and Chelsea battle

arts.ttl: Arsenal player visits club’s training facility for ‘informal talks’ – ‘Door open’ to Gunners exit
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus met with Palmeiras for ‘informal talks’ with the Brazilian club at their new youth training centre in June. That’s according to UOL, who say talks have been held with his former club about a return, but it is unlikely to happen.
